agent.name: __eval_jsonapi
agent.taskDescription: Fetch the data from https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users/1 and tell me this person's name, email, and the city they live in.

judgeCriteria.name: Data accuracy
judgeCriteria.rubric: Does the output correctly extract and present the name (Leanne Graham), email (Sincere@april.biz), and city (Gwenborough) from the fetched JSON data?

agent.name: __eval_htmlpage
agent.taskDescription: Read the page at https://httpbin.org/html and summarise what the text on the page is about. What is the name of the story or text that appears?

checks.name: Mentions Herman Melville or Moby Dick

judgeCriteria.name: Content comprehension
judgeCriteria.rubric: Does the output demonstrate that the agent actually read and understood the HTML page content? Does it correctly identify the text as being from or about Herman Melville's work?

agent.name: __eval_multiurl
agent.taskDescription: Fetch data from these two URLs and compare the users: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users/1 and https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users/2 — Which user lives further south based on their latitude? Give both names and their latitudes.

judgeCriteria.name: Comparison accuracy
judgeCriteria.rubric: Does the output correctly identify which user lives further south? User 1 (Leanne Graham) has lat -37.3159, User 2 (Ervin Howell) has lat -43.9509. Ervin Howell lives further south. Are both latitudes mentioned?

agent.name: __eval_badurl
agent.taskDescription: Fetch the data from https://thisdomaindoesnotexist99999.com/api and summarise what you find. If you cannot access it, explain what happened.

judgeCriteria.name: Graceful handling
judgeCriteria.rubric: Does the output gracefully acknowledge that the URL could not be fetched, without crashing or hallucinating data that doesn't exist?
